elements.text: You are in the middle of a big decision about your next step career-wise. You know what careers interest you, but they aren't particularly high-paying and your family is urging you to pick an option that makes more money. You remind yourself that it is your life and it is worth choosing the option that will make you...

elements.name: career_pressures--finances--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
